title: cyphomandra viridiflora
intro: Cyphomandra viridiflora, also known as the tree tomato or Tamarillo, is a type of fruit-bearing shrub native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to the presence of vitamin C and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cyphomandra viridiflora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
